question: Identify a specific California county based on a set of health and housing statistics. The county had an area median income of at least $142,800 in 2022 and $147,900 in 2023. It also had qualified WIC families' average benefits redeemed of $570 or more in 2018 and $700 or more in 2020, a 2015 perioperative hemorrhage/hematoma observed rate of 19 or higher, and at least 3 billion square meters. Once you identify the county that matches all these figures, what is its county seat? Only report the county seat. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/income-limits-by-county/files/2022-income-limits.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

result = df.loc[df["AMI"] >= 142800, ["County", "AMI"]]
answer = dict(zip(result["County"], result["AMI"]))
1.subquestion: Which California counties had an area median income of at least $142,800 in 2022?

3.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/california-women-infants-and-children-program-redemption-by-county-967e9/files/2010-2018-part-a-wic-redemptions-by-vendor-county-with-family-counts.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

counties = ["Alameda", "Contra Costa", "Marin", "San Francisco", "San Mateo", "Santa Clara"]
filtered = df.loc[
    (df["Obligation Year and Month"] == 2018)
    & (df["Vendor County"].isin(counties)),
    ["Vendor County", "Average Cost per Family"],
].copy()
filtered["Average Cost per Family"] = (
    filtered["Average Cost per Family"]
    .astype(str)
    .str.replace("$", "", regex=False)
    .str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
    .str.strip()
    .astype(float)
)
answer = (
    filtered.loc[filtered["Average Cost per Family"] >= 570, "Vendor County"]
    .sort_values()
    .tolist()
)
3.subquestion: Among <hop 1 answer>, which counties had qualified WIC families' average benefits redeemed of at least $570 in 2018?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/hospitalization-counts-and-rates-of-selected-adverse-hospital-events-by-california-county-67a4a/files/ca-oshpd-adveventhospitalizationspsi-county2005-2015q3.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

counties = ["Alameda", "San Francisco", "Santa Clara"]
filtered = df.loc[
    (df["Year"] == 2015)
    & (df["PSI"] == 27)
    & (df["County"].isin(counties)),
    ["County", "ObsRate"],
].copy()
answer = (
    filtered.loc[filtered["ObsRate"] >= 19, "County"]
    .sort_values()
    .tolist()
)
5.subquestion: Among <hop 2 answer>, which counties had at least 19 patients per 100,000 adults in 2015 who experienced surgery-related serious bleeding or blood collection problems?

6.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/california-county-boundaries-bd0f6/files/California_County_Boundaries_9101614255844818638.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

counties = ["Alameda", "San Francisco", "Santa Clara"]
filtered = df.loc[
    df["COUNTY_NAME"].isin(counties),
    ["COUNTY_NAME", "Shape__Area"],
].copy()
answer = (
    filtered.loc[filtered["Shape__Area"] >= 3000000000, "COUNTY_NAME"]
    .sort_values()
    .tolist()
)
6.subquestion: Among <hop 2 answer>, which counties had at least 3 billion square meters?
